methodology.purpose: Assess, quantify, and manage risks to data confidentiality, integrity, and availability across the organization's data lifecycle.
methodology.scope: All organizational data assets classified as Internal, Confidential, or Restricted, across on-premises and cloud environments.

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Asset Identification
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Identify data assets, classifications, owners, and processing activities

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Threat Identification
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Identify threats to data confidentiality, integrity, and availability

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Vulnerability Assessment
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Assess control weaknesses and exposure to identified threats

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Risk Analysis
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Calculate inherent risk using 5x5 likelihood vs. impact matrix

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Control Evaluation
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Evaluate existing data protection controls and their effectiveness

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Residual Risk Calculation
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Calculate residual risk after control effectiveness adjustment

riskAssessmentProcess.name: Treatment Planning
riskAssessmentProcess.description: Define treatment plans for risks exceeding risk appetite

reviewSchedule.fullAssessment: Annually or after significant change (merger, new regulations, major breach)
reviewSchedule.quarterlyReview: Review top risks, control effectiveness, and treatment progress
reviewSchedule.triggerBasedReview: Post-incident, new technology deployment, regulatory change

riskLevels.action: Immediate executive attention. Treat within 30 days.
Senior management attention. Treat within 90 days.
Monitor. Accept or treat during normal planning cycles.

risks.title: Unencrypted Sensitive Data at Rest
risks.description: Sensitive data stored without encryption on databases, file shares, or endpoints may be exposed through unauthorized access, theft, or improper disposal.

risks.title: Data Exfiltration via Insiders
risks.description: Authorized users may intentionally or accidentally exfiltrate sensitive data via email, USB, cloud storage, or printing.

risks.title: Ransomware Encrypting Backup Data
risks.description: Ransomware attack encrypting production and backup data, preventing recovery.

risks.title: Cryptographic Key Compromise
risks.description: Encryption keys stolen or exposed, allowing decryption of all data protected by those keys.

risks.title: Cloud Storage Misconfiguration
risks.description: Cloud storage buckets or blobs misconfigured with public access, exposing sensitive data to the internet.

risks.title: Weak TLS Configuration
risks.description: Services using deprecated TLS versions or weak cipher suites, enabling interception of data in transit.

risks.title: Database Breach via SQL Injection
risks.description: Attackers exploiting SQL injection vulnerabilities to extract database contents containing sensitive data.

risks.title: Production Data in Non-Production
risks.description: Real production data (including PII and PAN) used in development and testing environments with weaker security controls.

risks.title: Improper Data Disposal
risks.description: Sensitive data on decommissioned hardware or returned leased equipment recovered due to inadequate sanitization.

risks.title: Third-Party Data Breach
risks.description: Data exposed through compromised vendor or service provider with access to organizational data.

risks.title: Insufficient Data Classification
risks.description: Data not properly classified leading to inadequate protection controls and regulatory non-compliance.

risks.title: API Data Over-Exposure
risks.description: APIs returning excessive data beyond what is needed, exposing sensitive fields to unauthorized consumers.

risks.title: Backup Recovery Failure
risks.description: Backup data cannot be restored when needed due to corruption, encryption key loss, or untested procedures.

risks.title: Certificate Expiry Causing Outage
risks.description: Expired TLS certificates causing service outages and potentially falling back to unencrypted communications.

risks.title: DLP Evasion by Sophisticated Users
risks.description: Users circumventing DLP controls using encryption, steganography, or alternative channels not covered by DLP.

risks.title: Supply Chain File Transfer Compromise
risks.description: Compromise of file transfer systems used with partners and suppliers (similar to MOVEit breach).

risks.title: Cloud Key Management Dependency
risks.description: Over-reliance on cloud provider key management without BYOK/HYOK, limiting key control and portability.

risks.title: Data Breach Notification Non-Compliance
risks.description: Failure to detect and report data breaches within regulatory timelines due to inadequate monitoring.
